productName: Cormorant - 4 oz 1:1 Blackberry Lemonade Sorbet - 100 mg - 100ml
description: A chef-inspired sweet-tart lemonade edible with dessert-counter personality, smooth sweetness, and a carefully blended cannabis infusion. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1 ratio. Made for anyone who wants their edible to feel less like a dose and more like a little indulgence.
